creator: emaste@freebsd.org
text: Another issue arises from lib/libthr/thread/thr_exit.c which has a local stub implementation of _Unwind_ForcedUnwind, but does a dlsym(handle, "_Unwind_ForcedUnwind")). With symver the symbol is not exported by libthr.so and the dlsym correctly finds the one in libgcc_s.so. Without symver it returns the stub and results in an endless loop.
